reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Homecast
reauth_confirm.description: Your Homecast session has expired. Please re-authenticate to continue controlling your devices.

abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Homecast. Please check your relay is online.

create_entry.default: Connected to Homecast. Your HomeKit devices will appear shortly.
